seoTitle: Mellong vs Melrose Park — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Mellong and Melrose Park. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Mellong vs Melrose Park: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Mellong and Melrose Park.
heading: Mellong vs Melrose Park — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Mellong, New South Wales and Melrose Park, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Mellong has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Melrose Park (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Mellong or Melrose Park safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Mellong has a flood risk score of 34/100, while Melrose Park scores 46/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Mellong scores 28/100 for bushfire risk. Melrose Park scores 48/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Mellong or Melrose Park?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Mellong has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.48% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
